creator: ychsiao@ychsiao.org
text:
How-To-Repeat: $ portmaster -BDtw /usr/ports/devel/git

ValueError: unsupported hash type sha512

install -d -m 755 /usr/ports/devel/git/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1
install -m 644 git-subtree.1 /usr/ports/devel/git/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1
